name: prometheus-cli
summary: Free terminal AI coding agent. `pipx install prometheus-cli && prometheus` — works out of the box, no credit card. Drop in any free-tier API key (Groq, Gemini, Mistral, Cerebras, NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, Cloudflare, +5 more) for ~155K requests/day across 13 providers with automatic cross-provider failover. Read code, edit files, run shells, browse the web — one TUI, no vendor lock-in.
author: PrometheUS Contributors
